meanings.definition: the motion characteristic of fluids (liquids or gases)
move or progress freely as if in a stream
examples: The crowd flowed out of the stadium
the Missouri feeds into the Mississippi
The artist flowed the washes on the paper
The champagne flowed at the wedding

meanings.definition: fall or flow in a certain way
examples: Her long black hair flowed down her back
She started menstruating at the age of 11

meanings.definition: designed or arranged to offer the least resistant to fluid flow
